chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-466 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of M.A.No.1647/2025 (C/A). ------ 03.09.2025 Mr. Wakeel Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh assisted by Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w Irfan Hussain, Assistant Accounts Officer, District Accounts Office, Larkana and Naveed Ahmed Senior Auditor. ------ The District Accounts Officer, Larkano files compliance report alongwith authority letter as well as copies of pension bill and pension slip, which being self explanatory are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to the counsel for the petitioner. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh submits that since compliance has been made, therefore, listed application may be disposed of. Before parting with the order, it will be appropriate to reproduce the details of the paid amount to the petitioner in terms of the report submitted by the District Accounts Officer, Larkano, which reads as under: “DETAIL OF PAID AMOUNT GIVEN AS UNDER 1. That the total returned amount of undrawn pension Rs.465,896/- received from NBP Badah Branch, which was credited against the bank account of deceased Late Ruqia Khatoon from 21.10.2022 to 28.02.2024, same has been paid to the petitioner, copy of pension bill showing calculation of amount and pension slip attached at Annexure “A” 2. The amount of arrears of pension from 01.03.2024 to 31.03.2025 Rs.710,680/- included in attached pension bill copy of pension slip for the month of June, 2025 attached. 3.

That the total returned amount of undrawn pension Rs.465,896/- received from NBP Badah Branch, which was credited against the bank account of deceased Late Ruqia Khatoon from 21.10.2022 to 28.02.2024, same has been paid to the petitioner, copy of pension bill showing calculation of amount and pension slip attached at Annexure “A” 2. The amount of arrears of pension from 01.03.2024 to 31.03.2025 Rs.710,680/- included in attached pension bill copy of pension slip for the month of June, 2025 attached. 3. The amount of remaining arrears of pension Rs.49340/- from 01.04.2025 to 30.04.2025 paid through pension payroll for the month of August 2025 coy of pension slip attached.” Accordingly and in view of the above compliance report, the listed application is disposed of. Judge Judge Manzoor
